description: You are a clinic pharmacist. You have received a shipment of medication that needs to be added to the system inventory immediately. Log in to LibreHealth EHR (admin / password) and record a new inventory transaction (Purchase/Addition) for 'Simvastatin 20mg' with the following details: Quantity: 500, Lot Number: SIM-2025-X84, Expiration Date: 2028-12-31, and Vendor: PharmaDistro Inc. Ensure the stock level is updated.
